title: Past-el Palettes
description: Bringing back classic colors as dyes
body:
# Past-el Palettes
This mods adds 13 new dyes inspired by classic cloths' colors meant to be used by other datapacks or mods.

![An overview of every Past-el Palettes dyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04db93329c74030a4a087a5ed85f9a4aad32d506.png)
